creator: volf@oasis.IAEhv.nl
text:
Please upgrade x3270 to the latest version (patch added)

Fix: Remarks:

1) There was no maintainer, I have set myself to keep portlint happy. Maybe
   somebody with commit permissions is more useful here.

2) This release contains a new program x3270if, it compiles fine, but I
   did not test this (do not need that functionality).

Thankx,

            Frank
